name: StepFun API
description: Developer API for StepFun (阶跃星辰) Step-1/2 multimodal and reasoning LLM series.

seo.title: StepFun API — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: StepFun API: Developer API for StepFun (阶跃星辰) Step-1/2 multimodal and reasoning LLM series.

when_to_use: Accessing Step-2 frontier LLM for complex reasoning tasks
Building long-context AI apps with Step's native 256K context
Running multimodal understanding tasks via Step's vision model
Deploying cost-competitive frontier LLM inference in China

pros: Competitive price per token in China
cons: Brand recognition outside China is low
review.verdict: Capable Chinese multimodal API for APAC workloads, not yet a serious option for global teams.
review.best_for: Chinese-market apps needing multimodal and reasoning at local pricing
review.not_for: Global apps sending regulated data or needing English-first support

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage-based metered billing scales up and down
